history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A close-up, low-angle shot of a young man with dark, wavy hair, intensely focused as he plays the drums. His mouth is wide open in a shout or exertion, and sweat glistens on his neck and face. He wears a plain black t-shirt. To his right, a sheet of music is visible, resting on a stand. The lighting is dramatic and moody, with strong shadows and highlights that emphasize the intensity of the moment. The background is dark and out of focus, creating a sense of isolation and concentration. In the foreground, parts of the drum kit are visible, including a snare drum and cymbals. White text overlays the image, reading "OBSESSION beats talent." The overall mood is one of raw passion, dedication, and the relentless pursuit of a craft. The color palette is dominated by dark tones, with warm highlights on the skin and metallic glints from the drums. The style is realistic, with a cinematic, almost gritty feel.
